Form Object 01

A sculptural 3D desk object crafted from precision-milled resin, designed to evoke balance, calm, and modern elegance. Whether used as a creative accent, photography prop, or a tactile centerpiece, Form Object 01 invites interaction and visual interest into any space.

€249

Prenota Form Object 01 per €249 Regala Form Object 01 a $249

Include

  • Matte ceramic-style finish with soft edges

  • Made from durable, lightweight composite resin

  • Designed to elevate workspaces or interiors

Specifiche

  • Material: High-density resin composite

  • Finish: Textured matte with subtle grain

  • Dimensions: 160mm × 110mm × 40mm

  • Weight: 420g

Licenze

This license allows you to use the object for personal or commercial display. You may not reproduce, 3D scan, or resell its physical or digital design. Full license terms apply.

Domande Frequenti

Is this a functional product?

It’s primarily decorative, but many use it as a prop, paperweight, or display piece.

Can I use it in product photography?

Absolutely. Its neutral finish and minimalist form work beautifully in shoots.

Does it come in other finishes?

Currently, this object is only available in a muted sand tone. More finishes may be released later.

Vivi un’esperienza di ritratto pensata su misura, dove luce, tempo e presenza si incontrano per raccontare la tua storia. Contattaci per prenotare la tua sessione esclusiva nell’atelier.
